visual_summary: The image shows an indoor market space with multiple fruit and vegetable stalls under a high industrial ceiling. Several shoppers and vendors are visible, with some engaged in conversation and others selecting produce. The market sign 'MARCHÉ JEAN-TALON' is prominently displayed above the central walkway.

natural and diffused overhead lighting from tall windows

visual_summary: The image captures a narrow urban alleyway lined with old brick buildings on the left and a mix of brick and stone buildings on the right. A metal fence with red and black netting runs along the left side, indicating construction or roadwork. A prominent restaurant sign for 'CHICKEN PLUS +' with Korean and French text hangs above the sidewalk on the right, while a few pedestrians are seen walking in the distance.
location: Urban alley near restaurant area, possibly in a bilingual city (French-Korean).
continuity_anchors: sidewalk layout with doorways and signage
plausible_actions: pedestrians walking or entering the restaurant
work or maintenance behind the construction fence
passing vehicles near the fenced area
cinematic_notes: use shallow depth of field to focus on the restaurant sign against blurred urban background
shot from low angle to emphasize fence leading to distant buildings
natural overcast light for even exposure and moody feel

visual_summary: The image shows a blue STM metro train stopped at an underground platform. Several passengers are visible through the train windows, seated or standing, some wearing hooded jackets and backpacks. The platform floor is covered with yellow tactile paving for safety.
continuity_anchors: blue color of the train with white stripe
STM logo and 'Mouvement Collectif' text on train
plausible_actions: passengers boarding or alighting the train
cinematic_notes: Side profile shot emphasizing train length and passengers inside
Use of the yellow tactile paving for leading lines in composition
Play with reflections on train windows for layered visuals
Lighting contrast between underground platform and train interior

visual_summary: The image shows a tiled floor area beside a staircase with a handrail, and two illuminated fashion advertisements mounted on a wall. The advertisements feature male and female models wearing stylish summer clothing, with the left ad labeled 'TRISTAN' and the right one labeled 'LE POUVOIR DU STYLE.' Above the advertisements, a sign reads 'McGILL,' indicating a station or venue name.
location: Indoor subway or metro station platform near stairs
continuity_anchors: illuminated fashion ads with branded content
plausible_actions: commuters walking up or down the stairs
someone stopping to read or photograph the ads
cleaning or maintenance activity on stairs or ads
lighting changes as day turns to night
cinematic_notes: low angle shot capturing staircase geometry and ads backlit for contrast
use of warm artificial light to emphasize urban underground ambiance
potential for dramatic shadows from staircase railings
possibility of tracking shot following a person ascending or descending stairs
